title: Operators
summary: Provides core multilinear operator constructors and their evaluation rules.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Provides core multilinear operator constructors and their evaluation rules.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in PolyGJMSoperators/Operators.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: multi Zero. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: multi Add. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def multiAdd {r : ℕ} (P Q : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: multi Sub. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def multiSub {r : ℕ} (P Q : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: multi Smul. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def multiSmul {r : ℕ} (c : ℝ) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: postcomp. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def postcomp {r : ℕ} (L : Function Conf → Function Conf) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: precomp Slot. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def precompSlot {r : ℕ} (i : Fin r) (L : Function Conf → Function Conf) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: precomp All. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def precompAll {r : ℕ} (L : Fin r → Function Conf → Function Conf) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: multi Zero apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem multiZero_apply {r : ℕ} (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) : CalConf.multiZero r F = zero Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: multi Add apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem multiAdd_apply {r : ℕ} (P Q : CalConf.MultiOperator r) (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) (U : Conf.AmbientBundle) : CalConf.multiAdd P Q F U = P F U + Q F U

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: multi Smul apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem multiSmul_apply {r : ℕ} (c : ℝ) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) (U : Conf.AmbientBundle) : CalConf.multiSmul c P F U = c * P F U

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: postcomp apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem postcomp_apply {r : ℕ} (L : Function Conf → Function Conf) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) : CalConf.postcomp L P F = L (P F)

references.note: Source for multilinear tangentiality and Laplacian-word constructions.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
